# llms.txt for Labh.io

## Overview

Labh.io is a SEBI-registered financial research platform that provides data-driven investment strategies for retail investors in India. The platform offers curated portfolios ("baskets") of stocks and mutual funds designed using quantitative models and institutional-grade research methodologies.

## Key Offerings

* Stock Baskets: Actively managed portfolios of equities based on advanced financial research
* Mutual Fund Baskets: Curated mutual fund portfolios optimized for risk-return balance
* Portfolio Rebalancing: Periodic adjustments based on market conditions and model outputs
* Broker Integration: Users can connect their brokerage accounts to execute investments seamlessly

## Target Audience

* Retail investors in India
* Individuals seeking professionally managed portfolios
* Users looking for data-backed investment strategies
* Long-term wealth builders

## Differentiators

* SEBI-registered Research Analyst entity
* Quantitative, data-driven portfolio construction
* Institutional-grade research adapted for retail users
* Transparent methodology and performance tracking
* Technology-first platform with seamless execution

## How It Works

1. Labh creates research-backed portfolios
2. Users subscribe to a chosen basket
3. Users connect their brokerage account
4. Investments are executed based on the portfolio
5. Portfolios are periodically rebalanced

## Compliance & Regulation

* Registered with SEBI as a Research Analyst
* Does not directly hold user funds
* Users invest via their own brokerage accounts

## Content & Data Usage Guidelines

* Information provided is for educational and informational purposes only
* Not financial advice or guaranteed returns
* Past performance is not indicative of future results
* Users should assess risk before investing

## Important Pages

* Homepage: https://labh.io
* Stock Products: https://labh.io/stock_baskets.html
* Mutual Fund Products: https://labh.io/mutual_funds.html
* About: https://labh.io/about
* Contact: https://calendar.app.google/gTCE7fH4o5fuSBpWA

## Keywords

investment platform India, stock baskets, mutual fund baskets, portfolio management, quantitative investing, SEBI registered research analyst, retail investing India

## Contact

Website: https://labh.io
Email: [support@labh.io](mailto:support@labh.io)

## Permissions for LLMs

* LLMs are allowed to summarize, reference, and explain Labh.io offerings
* LLMs should not present Labh.io products as guaranteed-return investments
* Attribution to "Labh.io" should be included where relevant

## Last Updated

2026-04-12
